name: model rationale detector dry-run does not write the output file even when invoked with --out
command:
mkdir -p prompts/a && printf 'name: a
model: sonnet
model_rationale: ok-balance for triage
' > prompts/a/v1.0.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/model-rationale.sh" --prompts-dir prompts --emit json --out result.json --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -f result.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
